**The World Snooker Championship is set to conclude with a highly anticipated final between Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize.**
## Context / Background
The World Snooker Championship has been an exciting tournament so far, with many top players competing for the coveted title. Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize have made it to the final, and fans are eagerly waiting to see who will emerge victorious.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Player | Age | Ranking | Previous Titles |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Shaun Murphy | 40 | 11 | 1 |
| Wu Yize | 22 | 27 | 0 |

## Key Quote
> 'He'll need to tell us his secret' - analysing Murphy's new break-off

## What's Next?
The final match between Shaun Murphy and Wu Yize is scheduled to take place, and fans can expect a thrilling competition. The winner will be crowned the new World Snooker Champion, and it will be interesting to see how the match unfolds.
